value.found_quote: OpenAI is deprecating the Evals platform. Existing evals content remains available during the transition window. Evals will become read-only for existing users on October 31, 2026, and the platform is scheduled to shut down on November 30, 2026.
value.rationale: The page clearly substantiates the existence of the Evals API — it is a full guide on "configuring evals programmatically using the Evals API," with detailed code examples for creating evals, running them, and retrieving results via API endpoints (e.g., POST /v1/evals, POST /v1/evals/{id}/runs). However, the page also prominently states that OpenAI is deprecating the Evals platform, with a read-only cutoff of October 31, 2026, and a full shutdown on November 30, 2026. Therefore the offering exists and is currently functional, but is officially deprecated.
